data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of different pay rates per role, specifically lead at $150 and assistant at $75. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete checks or confirmations regarding the pay rates assigned to the roles in the booking system. The linked use case mentions the pay rates, but without explicit evidence of the rates being applied in the system, there is a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the application of different pay rates per role.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for pay rate validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the pay rates for lead and assistant roles are set correctly in the system.
